title: Bridge Essay: Single-lead ECG based autonomic nervous system assessment for meditation monitor

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** (Phase 2) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Breath/Soul to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Single-lead ECG based autonomic nervous system assessment for meditation monitoring.** — Sci Rep. PMID: 36581715. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-022-27121-x. We propose asingle-lead ECG-based heart rate variability (HRV) analysis algorithm to quantify autonomic nervous system activity during meditation. Respiratory sinus arrhythmia (RSA) induced by breathing is adominant component of HRV, but its frequency depends on an individual'sbreathing speed. To address this RSA issue, we designed anovel HRV tachogram decomposition algorithm and new HRV indices. The proposed method was validated by using asimulation, and applied to our experimental (mindfu
